innateAbility.name: Switch Discipline
innateAbility.description: Switches between his weapons — the Kazurai Katana and the Shodo Sai.The higher Kez's level, the lower the cooldown.

abilities.name: Echo Slash
abilities.description: Slashes forward in a line with his Katana, instant attacks and applies a brief movement speed slow to affected enemy units.

abilities.name: Falcon Rush
abilities.description: Rushes toward enemy units within a distance with movement speed and slow resistance bonus.When attacking, echoes will be created, dealing secondary attacks.

abilities.name: Grappling Claw
abilities.description: Swings on a grappling hook toward the unit-targeted tree or enemy. Applies movement speed slow on the affected enemy until Kez reaches it.

abilities.name: Talon Toss
abilities.description: Throws a Sai-based projectile that damages and silences the unit-targeted enemy.

abilities.name: Kazurai Katana
abilities.description: All abilities and Katana-based attacks apply health regeneration reduction, with a stacking damage over time debuff based on the attack damage dealt.

abilities.name: Shodo Sai
abilities.description: Grants a passive chance for critical hits on attacks. Some abilities can also apply a temporary mark on affected enemy units.

abilities.name: Cancel
abilities.description: Instantly cancels parrying and stop blocking incoming physical attacks.

abilities.name: Raptor Dance
abilities.description: Applies a Basic Dispel upon cast.Enters into an uncontrollable state that grants brief invulnerability then absolute magic resistance for the cast time and for the entire ability duration.

abilities.name: Raven's Veil
abilities.description: Releases a veil of smoke within the radius while briefly reducing their vision. Affected enemy units regain their vision over time.

talents.left: +1 Echo Slash Attack-0.6 Echo Slash Interval

talents.right: +6% Katana Mode Attack Damage+6% Sai Mode Move Speed
